ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: The file or folder to load snippets from. The file or folder must be within your vault, and not within a hidden folder (such as .obsidian/).
ast.target: 用于加载片段的文件或文件夹。该文件或文件夹必须在你的库中，且不在隐藏文件夹内（例如 .obsidian/）。

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: e.g. \\dot{x}^{2} + \\dot{y}^{2} will display as \u1E8B\xB2 + \u1E8F\xB2, and \\sqrt{ 1-\\beta^{2} } will display as \u221A{ 1-\u03B2\xB2 }.
ast.target: 例如 \\dot{x}^{2} + \\dot{y}^{2} 将显示为 \u1E8B\xB2 + \u1E8F\xB2，而 \\sqrt{ 1-\\beta^{2} } 将显示为 \u221A{ 1-\u03B2\xB2 }。

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: The file or folder to load snippet variables from. The file or folder must be within your vault, and not within a hidden folder (such as .obsidian/).
ast.target: 用于加载片段变量的文件或文件夹。该文件或文件夹必须在你的库中，且不在隐藏文件夹内（例如 .obsidian/）。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Obsidian Latex Suite: this plugin supports your IME keyboard, but
ast.target: Obsidian Latex Suite：此插件支持你的 IME 键盘，但

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: is currently enabled. You may want to disable it in the plugin settings to fully enable automatic snippets. Be aware that this may cause unexpected snippet triggers while using your IME. To turn this warning off, enable
ast.target: 目前已启用。你可能需要在插件设置中将其禁用，以完全启用自动片段。请注意，这可能会在使用 IME 时导致意外的片段触发。要关闭此警告，请启用

ast.name: error
ast.source: Failed to insert newline and indent latex-suite-insert-newline-and-indent
ast.target: 无法插入换行并缩进 latex-suite-insert-newline-and-indent

ast.name: error
ast.target: 在工具提示中渲染数学公式时出错：

ast.name: setButtonText
ast.target: 重置为默认片段

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 是否启用片段。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to load snippets from a specified file, or from all files within a folder (instead of from the plugin settings).
ast.target: 是否从指定文件加载片段，或从文件夹内所有文件加载（而非从插件设置中加载）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 是否对匹配的括号着色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When the cursor is adjacent to a bracket, highlight the matching bracket.
ast.target: 当光标紧邻括号时，高亮匹配的括号。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where to display the popup preview relative to the equation source.
ast.target: 相对于公式源的位置显示弹出预览。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to highlight the area within the nearest pair of brackets around the cursor in the popup preview.
ast.target: 是否在弹出预览中高亮光标周围最近一对括号内的区域。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 是否启用自动分数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A list of environments to exclude auto-fraction from running in. For example, to exclude auto-fraction from running while inside an exponent, such as e^{...}, use  ["^{", "}"]
ast.target: 要排除自动分数运行的环境列表。例如，要在指数内（如 e^{...}）排除自动分数运行，请使用  ["^{", "}"]

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A list of characters that denote the start/end of a fraction. e.g. if + is included in the list, "a+b/c" will expand to "a+\frac{b}{c}". If + is not in the list, it will expand to "\frac{a+b}{c}".
ast.target: 表示分数起始/结束的字符列表。例如，如果列表中包含 +，"a+b/c" 将展开为 "a+\frac{b}{c}"。如果列表中不包含 +，则会展开为 "\frac{a+b}{c}"。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 是否启用矩阵快捷键。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A list of environment names to run the matrix shortcuts in, separated by commas.
ast.target: 运行矩阵快捷键的环境名称列表，用逗号分隔。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 是否启用 tabout。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A list of closing brackets for tabout, separated by commas.
ast.target: tabout 的右括号列表，用逗号分隔。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to automatically enlarge brackets containing e.g. sum, int, frac.
ast.target: 是否自动放大包含如 sum、int、frac 的括号。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A list of symbols that should trigger auto-enlarge brackets, separated by commas.
ast.target: 应触发括号自动放大的符号列表，用逗号分隔。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Assign snippet variables that can be used as shortcuts when writing snippets.
ast.target: 分配可在编写片段时用作快捷方式的片段变量。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to load snippet variables from a specified file, or from all files within a folder (instead of from the plugin settings).
ast.target: 是否从指定文件或文件夹内所有文件加载片段变量（而不是从插件设置中加载）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Symbols that will be treated as word delimiters, for use with the "w" snippet option.
ast.target: 将被视为单词分隔符的符号，用于 "w" 片段选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to suppress snippets triggering when an IME is active.
ast.target: 是否在 IME 处于活动状态时抑制片段触发。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether a warning is shown on startup if `Don't trigger snippets when IME is active` is enabled. Disable that setting if you are aware of the IME limitations. Currently only ios and android touch/swipe keyboards like gboard have support for IME. See https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite/blob/main/DOCS.md#IME-keyboards for more info.
ast.target: 如果启用 `Don't trigger snippets when IME is active`，启动时是否显示警告。若了解 IME 的限制，请禁用该设置。目前只有 ios 和 android 的触摸/滑动键盘（如 gboard）支持 IME。更多信息见 https://github.com/artisticat1/obsidian-latex-suite/blob/main/DOCS.md#IME-keyboards。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Codeblock languages where the whole code block should be treated like a math block, separated by commas.
ast.target: 需要将整个代码块视为数学块的代码块语言，用逗号分隔。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the level of debug information to log about snippet expansion. Set to "info" or "verbose" to help identify issues with snippet syntax or why a snippet is not expanding. Verbose mode will log most information to the developer console on debug level.
ast.target: 设置要记录的片段展开调试信息级别。设置为 "info" 或 "verbose" 以帮助识别片段语法问题或片段未展开的原因。详细模式会在调试级别将大部分信息记录到开发者控制台。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: turn on/off vim keybindings. Note vim needs to be enabled in obsidian itself.
ast.target: 启用/关闭 vim 键位绑定。注意需要在 obsidian 本身启用 vim。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Make equations more readable by hiding LaTeX syntax and instead displaying it in a pretty format.
ast.target: 通过隐藏 LaTeX 语法并以美观格式显示，使公式更易读。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: LaTeX beneath the cursor will be revealed.
ast.target: 光标下方的 LaTeX 将被显示。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Disabled by default to not confuse new users. However, I recommend turning this on once you are comfortable with the plugin!
ast.target: 默认禁用以免让新用户困惑。不过，当你熟悉插件后，我建议开启此功能！

ast.name: setText
ast.source: How long to delay the reveal of LaTeX for, in milliseconds, when the cursor moves over LaTeX. Defaults to 0 (LaTeX under the cursor is revealed immediately).
ast.target: 当光标移到 LaTeX 上时，延迟显示 LaTeX 的时间（毫秒）。默认为 0（光标下的 LaTeX 立即显示）。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Can be set to a positive number, e.g. 300, to delay the reveal of LaTeX, making it much easier to navigate equations using arrow keys.
ast.target: 可设为正数，例如 300，以延迟显示 LaTeX，使使用方向键浏览公式更容易。

ast.name: setText
ast.target: 必须是整数 ≥ 0。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: When inside an equation, show a popup preview window of the rendered math.
ast.target: 在公式内时，显示渲染后的数学内容弹出预览窗口。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: The popup preview will be shown for all inline math equations, as well as for block math equations in Source mode.
ast.target: 弹出预览将对所有行内数学公式显示，也会在源代码模式下对块级数学公式显示。

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.target: 重置为默认代码片段
